title: F&F: Special 'Mons
description: A Cobblemon add-on made for the Forge & Fables modpack!
body:
# F&F: Special 'Mons This mod adds onto the already existing _'Mons_ from Cobblemon. These will be unique in design, moveset, abilities and sometimes even typing! These custom made _'Mons_ are mainly meant to enjoy for fun, so they can definitely be unbalanced and they do not spawn naturally!

## Special? Yes, special! These are 'Mons that I would rather seperate into its own mod because they're overpowered, ugly, funny or half-functional! These really are just meant for laughs and not to be taken seriously!

## Commands Here are some commands to help you get started with spawning our Special Custom _'Mons_; > - /pokespawn rayquaza_tractor level=(your desired level)
## Inspiration My inspiration mainly came from doomscrolling through TikTok for a while and running into [this](https://www.tiktok.com/@nifreffa/video/7513392266078227758) video and it inspired me to make Rayquaza Tractor! Thanks for downloading! <3
